history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man stands confidently, pointing to a large, elaborate crest behind him. He's wearing a black collared shirt with short sleeves, dark, slightly distressed jeans, and black and white sneakers. The crest is a prominent feature, displaying a golden eagle with outstretched wings, a red shield with what appears to be the Indonesian coat of arms (a Garuda bird and stars), and banners that read "KESATRIA 55ADAWIRAZASADE" and "1 ST WIBISANA ANNIVERSARY". The background features a large white screen displaying a quote in bold Indonesian text: "BANYAK YANG INGIN MENGUBURKU NAMUN MEREKA LUPA AKU ADALAH BENIH KESATRIA YANG AKAN TETAP TUMBUH." The floor is covered with a patterned carpet in warm tones of orange, yellow, and brown, with streaks of dark blue. The lighting is dramatic, with spotlights creating strong highlights and shadows, giving the scene a theatrical and celebratory feel. The overall mood is one of pride, resilience, and celebration.
